channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: Burger King SG Latest e-Coupons Up to 62% Breakfast, Meals & Snacks Till 4 Oct 2026
item.description: Big savings on Burger King favourites

item.title: KFC S’pore $6.70 (usual $9.80) 2pcs Hot & Crispy Chicken Meal from 6 – 7 Jul 2026
item.description: Save up to $3.10

item.title: Sheng Siong Housebrand 50% OFF Mao Shang King Potong Ice Cream 6s & More Until 6 Jul 2026
item.description: Save on housebrand favourites, CDC voucher specials, frozen foods and everyday grocery essentials.

item.title: Texas Chicken S’pore $1 Fried Chicken Promotion on 6 July 2026
item.description: Crispy fried chicken for just $1

item.title: Trip.com S’pore 7.7 Mega Sale from 7 to 10 July 2026
item.description: Score big on your next getaway

item.title: Coffee Bean SG New Croissant with ‘Orh Nee’ Spread & Coddled Eggs Weekday Breakfast Set from 6 Jul 2026
item.description: Enjoy a local-inspired breakfast with croissant, coddled eggs and great weekday value.

item.title: FairPrice Ice Cream Price Drop Niseko, Magnolia & More Until 15 Jul 2026
item.description: Tubs, cones, sticks and multipacks from popular ice cream brands.

item.description: Your fried chicken craving just got more affordable.

item.description: Double up on health, beauty and wellness essentials

item.description: If you're ordering Venti anyway, don't miss this.

item.title: Up to 20% off TVs + up to $700 off soundbars
item.description: Jackpot Sale storewide: up to 20% off selected TVs (free gifts worth up to $1,888), up to $700 off soundbars, plus fridge, washer and Dyson deals. Selected models, while stocks last.

item.title: Up to 55% off designer handbags, shoes & watches
item.description: Official Michael Kors sale with further reductions across designer handbags, shoes, watches and clothing — over 1,000 styles. Example: the Ava extra-small Saffiano crossbody is down from $430 to $189.

item.title: Designer leather bags on sale + free shipping
item.description: Coach Singapore's official leather bag sale — exclusive deals on handbags and signature styles, with free shipping for a limited time. New customers get 10% off their first order with code HELLO10.
